zh.Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis Warde於1579年10月25日出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可費爾比時，他的父親Robert Ward37歲，母親Alyce Paston34歲。他於1603年6月與Susanah Browne在英國諾福爾可費爾比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1620年住在英國諾福爾可彤絲朵且於1627年住在英國諾福爾可素斯 瓦爾申馬。他去世於1647年1月29日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Warde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Donal.

variants.name: Ward
meanings: English: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Middle English ward ‘watchman, guard’ (Old English weard, used as both an agent noun and an abstract noun).
English: occupational name from Middle English warde ‘armed guard’ (Old English weard ‘watching, guarding’), with the same meaning as 1 above.

Irish: shortened form of McWard, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Bhaird ‘son of the poet’. The surname occurs throughout Ireland, where three different branches of the family are known as professional poets.

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Francis Warde was born on 25 October 1579, in Filby, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Ward, was 37 and his mother, Alyce Paston, was 34. He married Susanah Browne in June 1603, in Filby, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in Tunstall, Norfolk, England in 1620 and South Walsham, Norfolk, England in 1627. He died on 29 January 1647, in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Susanah Browne en juin 1603, à Filby, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. ja.lifeSummary: Francis Wardeが1579年10月25日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクフィルビーで生まれた時，父Robert Wardは37歳，母Alyce Pastonは34歳であった。1603年6月にイギリスノーフォルクフィルビーでSusanah Browneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1620年にはイギリスノーフォルクトゥンスタルに，1627年にはイギリスノーフォルクソウス ワルシャムに住んでいた。彼は1647年1月29日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクグレアト ヤーモウスで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクグレアト ヤーモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.Ormesby, St. Michael, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 마거릿
ko.lifeSummary: Francis Warde(이)가 1579년 10월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 피비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Ward(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Alyce Paston(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1603년 6월 영국 노르폴크 피비에서 Susanah Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1620년도에 영국 노르폴크 툰스탤에서, 1627년도에 영국 노르폴크 소우스 월샤에서 살았다. 그는 1647년 1월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그리트 야모우스에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그리트 야모우스에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Susanah Browne em junho de 1603, em Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Tunstall, Norfolk, Inglaterra em 1620 e em South Walsham, Norfolk, Inglaterra em 1627. ru.Ormesby, St. Michael, Norfolk, England: ормесби ст маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis Warde родился 25 октября 1579 г. в местности филби, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Ward было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alyce Paston, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Susanah Browne июнь 1603 г. в местности филби, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности тунсталл, норфолк, Англия в 1620 году и в местности соут валшам, норфолк, Англия в 1627 году. Он умер 29 января 1647 г. в местности грит ярмоут, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности грит ярмоут, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Francis Warde nació el 25 de octubre de 1579, en Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Ward, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Alyce Paston, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Susanah Browne en junio de 1603, en Filby, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Tunstall, Norfolk, Inglaterra en 1620 y en South Walsham, Norfolk, Inglaterra en 1627. Murió el 29 de enero de 1647, en Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
